institutions_named: Garante per la protezione dei dati personali; OpenAI, L.L.C.
procedural_context_supported_now: Italian DPA order text supports a narrow claim about urgent provisional limitation of ChatGPT personal-data processing for data subjects in Italy, including regulator-stated information, legal-basis, accuracy, and age-verification concerns.
integrity_signal_supported_now: Accuracy and record-quality concerns are directly stated in regulator order text, but this row is not about fabricated court citations or filing contamination.
response_burden_or_action_signal: Official regulatory intervention is directly supported by the issuing authority's document text.
frequency_signal: Single event-specific regulator action; not a frequency dataset.
claim_ceiling_now: Document-grade support for narrow regulator-order claims only.
stronger_source_needed: Second document-grade court, tribunal, or institutional process-integrity record from another family.
paper_use: Benchmark document-grade anchor for process-contamination discussion.
visualization_hook: Process-integrity ladder: regulator order text versus broadcaster direct-source extraction.
caution: Do not generalize from this order to broad legal-system contamination or final illegality beyond the order text.

institutions_named: Internal Finland Police; Eastern Finland Administrative Court
procedural_context_supported_now: A direct Yle article says Internal Finland Police and the Eastern Finland Administrative Court have noticed AI-assisted administrative appeals, including appeals against police decisions before the administrative court.
integrity_signal_supported_now: The article supports a narrow claim that some filings reportedly cite non-existent cases or invoke legal practice from distorted perspectives.
response_burden_or_action_signal: The article supports a narrow workload claim that authorities still must respond to the raised arguments, increasing administrative burden.
frequency_signal: Quoted journalistic estimate only: none seen in 2024, several in 2025, pace accelerated, and one police lawyer estimated 10–20 appeals in the previous year that he identified as AI-drafted.
claim_ceiling_now: Direct-source-resolved broadcaster support for bounded descriptive claims about AI-assisted administrative-appeal contamination; not official statistics, sanctions, or system-wide prevalence.
stronger_source_needed: Official Finnish police, court, ministry, or judicial-process guidance source independently confirming the phenomenon or procedural response.
paper_use: Reviewer-safe multilingual appendix row and limitations text showing a second family beyond the Italian regulator order.
visualization_hook: Jurisdiction/language coverage matrix; authority-weighted procedural-contamination bridge; workload-burden panel.
caution: Machine-assisted reading plus one journalistic source is not enough for final legal or policy conclusions.
